## 📝 Notes

1. OSRM routing data was retrieved from OpenStreetMap on the date of analysis.
2. Realistic times account for traffic lights, pedestrian crossings, and natural movement speed.
3. The route is entirely within Boulder city limits, on well-maintained streets.
4. All segment times are based on OpenStreetMap routing engine output.
5. This analysis is designed to help Boulder residents make informed sustainable commuting decisions.
